title: Wanting Wealth Is Allowed
subtitle: An affirmation practice for releasing the guilt of financial desire
excerpt: An affirmation practice for Day 15 of the money arc. The affirmations work with the guilt layer: the belief that wanting wealth is somehow selfish or wrong. They replace it with the straightforward fact that financial desire is natural, clean, and allowed.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Built from the Day 15 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.

practice.whenToUse: When financial desire comes with guilt attached — when wanting more money feels like something to justify or apologise for.

content.text: Affirmations for Day 15 of the money arc. Read each one aloud or internally, letting it land before moving to the next. These work directly with the guilt that can sit underneath financial desire.
New to affirmation practice? Read
affirmations as practice
first.
The practice
The affirmations
Wanting wealth is allowed.
My desire for abundance is natural and good.
I can be generous and wealthy at the same time.
Wanting more does not make me selfish.
I release guilt about dreaming big.
I am worthy of financial freedom — no justification required.
Wealth does not change who I am. It amplifies what I already am.
I welcome abundance with a clear conscience.
I allow myself to want this out loud.
My financial desires are safe to hold.
Where this practice comes from
Built from the Day 15 theme of
MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout
(Rebecca J Page, 2025): releasing guilt about wanting wealth.
